Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm getting the hang of brushing[n]Koromaru. He's loving it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}His coat is looking even shinier![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hehe, Koro-chan looks so comfy. You sure know your way around a brush, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, you might know something about this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Lots of people like to give Koro-chan gifts whenever he goes for a walk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Do you know where he's keeping them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh, hm. Then he must've hidden them really well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I wanted to make sure there wasn't any raw food that could go bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I see. So you're not sure exactly where they are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I wanted to make sure there wasn't any raw food that could go bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, well, I guess even Koromaru needs his own privacy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Do you think we should give him his own room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Ah, right, you're still in the middle of brushing him. I'll leave you to it, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I brushed him with all my heart...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru's fur is unbelievably shiny![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He looks more fearless[n]than ever! What a dog![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To say thanks for the brushing,[n]Koromaru brought {f 4 4 1 37 0 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if this is what[n]Fuuka was talking about...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I played with an overly-excited[n]Koromaru before heading to my room.[n]{f 1 1}
